verification.note: Reported by the MoE-AMC authors (Gao, Cao, Chen, arXiv:2312.02298, Dec 2023), NOT reproduced or re-run by this repo. 0.7176 = the paper's headline 'average classification accuracy across SNR levels' on RadioML 2018.01a (24-class), confirmed in the abstract and Table 1 (full -20..+30 dB average, NOT a high-SNR peak). Same dataset + full-SNR accuracy_overall metric as our canonical split -> 'from_paper'. CAVEAT: this exceeds the next-best on-board literature figure (moeformer-paper 0.6422) by ~7.5 points -- a large margin for a preprint MoE model; read it as an OPTIMISTIC upper reference until independently corroborated. Split indices unpublished, so overlap with amc-radioml2018-strat-snr-8010-seed42-v1 is unconfirmed -- only dataset + protocol match. Literature reference point, never conflated with an in-repo reproduced number.
